summary: Phase 8 refactoring of OrdersMap.js tested successfully. The useTheme hook integration is working correctly. Frontend compiles without errors. File reduced from 2340 to 2298 lines (~42 lines saved). Unable to fully test delivery page UI due to WhatsApp 2FA verification requirement for login.

frontend_compilation.message: webpack compiled successfully after useTheme hook integration

useTheme_hook_integration.hook_usage: PASS - Lines 101-107: Correctly destructures themeMode, currentTheme, effectiveTheme, isDark
useTheme_hook_integration.no_duplicate_declarations: PASS - No duplicate useState for themeMode or currentTheme found

features: Auto theme based on time (6AM-6PM = light, else dark)

frontend_load_test.message: Frontend loads without errors, no error elements on page

login_test.reason: WhatsApp 2FA verification required for new device login - cannot access delivery page without verification code

changes_made: Added import for useTheme hook at line 62
Replaced inline theme state management with useTheme hook at lines 101-107
Removed ~40 lines of duplicate theme management code

hook_returns.effectiveTheme: Computed theme based on mode and time
hook_returns.isDark: Boolean indicating if dark theme is active
hook_returns.cycleTheme: Function to cycle through theme modes

code_review_comments: useTheme hook is properly implemented with localStorage persistence
Auto theme feature correctly switches based on time of day (6AM-6PM)
No duplicate state declarations found after refactoring
Hook values are correctly used throughout the OrdersMap component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 refactoring completed successfully. useTheme hook integrated into OrdersMap.js. File reduced from 2340 to 2298 lines. Frontend compiles without errors. Note: Full UI testing of delivery page requires WhatsApp 2FA verification which cannot be automated. The code structure and hook integration have been verified through static analysis.
